hero.title: The White Mercedes

hero.description: One vehicle. One standard. Unmatched privacy and comfort across the island of Santorini.

fleet.title: Mercedes-Benz C 180

tours.title: Beyond the Transfer
tours.subtitle: Two signature routes crafted for those who seek more than a destination.

tour1.title: Caldera Panorama
tour1.description: A journey along the volcanic rim. Witness whitewashed architecture cascade into the ancient caldera, with private stops at the most breathtaking viewpoints.

tour2.title: Oia Sunset Ritual
tour2.description: Arrive at Oia Castle before the crowds gather. Watch the world-famous sunset in relative solitude, then return under a canopy of Aegean stars.

custom.title: Custom Tours
custom.description: Interested in a specific destination? We offer fully customizable routes tailored to your needs upon request.
